name: Deeper Insights
description: Deeper Insights Skip to content Anna Maria Newton I have combined a long professional career with a lifetime fascination for the science of self-actualisation. – This fascination continues to be a rich journey which informs what I bring to my work in every way. Clients – very kindly – speak of my skill in eliciting clarity and focus – my tenacity in coaching for growth and crucially: for real and lasting insight. Essentially a pragmatist I believe coaching is always about the bottom line. But equally that success is not just about what you have achieved but who you become. Working with business executives since 1999, I have again and again, sought to bring out the A-ha moment….because the client does know best – they just may not know how to surface that ‘best’. How I work My approach is very much to surface these insights – and provide the tools so clients can be self-sustaining and then I exit. With a team I might work briefly with each team member – design and deliver the intervention – and come back to do a maintenance check before exiting. Exit is a very important concept here: in and out –no dependence allowed. Indeed dependence is the antithesis of the process. The core principle is realisation– and on, to the next level of development and growth. Moving on I’m at the end of a phone for questions – or a fresh intervention after the original has become a competency and people are ready to move even further on. But really, the core principle is enablement. Insight changes our experience of life – and hence everything about our lives. I work with senior executives and teams in the UK and internationally. I was very sceptical when a former GM in the division asked me to take the Birkman test. I had done a few of those profiling tests in the past and was certain this was going to be just another one…Well, I couldn’t be more wrong. name: Computas
description: Frontpage - Computas Frontpage - Computas Løsninger folk elsker Videre til innholdet Computas er en nordisk leverandør av IT-tjenester og rådgivning. Vi utvikler verdiskapende og samfunnsnyttige løsninger til offentlig og privat sektor. Vi har 40 års erfaring med system- og applikasjons-utvikling og er en av Nordens fremste eksperter på skyløsninger, AI og maskinlæring. Jobber vi er stolte av Slik jobber vi og Hafslund med AI-assistert koding AI endrer ikke bare hvordan kode skrives, men hvordan utviklere jobber, tenker og samarbeider. Hos Computas’ kunde Hafslund har utviklingsteamene systematisk testet AI-assistert programmering. Erfaringen? Raskere innsikt, effektiv koding og høyere kvalitet Les mer AI øker melkeproduksjon og forbedrer dyrevelferd Hvis ei ku har det bra, ligger hun mer ned – og for hver ekstra time hun ligger, produserer hun i snitt 1,5 liter mer melk. Å holde oversikt over hvor mye hver enkelt ku faktisk ligger i løpet av et døgn er imidlertid både tidkrevende og omfattende for bøndene, særlig når en gjennomsnittsbesetning for danske melkebønder teller over 300 kyr som beveger seg fritt i fjøset. Les mer Sparer millioner med skreddersydde Copiloter SpareBank 1 SMN så mulighetene for å gjøre sine ansatte både mer effektive og fornøyde ved å ta i bruk kunstig intelligens. Men hvordan kan en bank med 1700 ansatte gjøre informasjon tilgjengelig gjennom KI-assistenter uten å miste kontroll eller bryte med lovverket? Skreddersydde copiloter ble løsningen for banken og har gitt de ansatte en bedre arbeidshverdag. Les mer DFØ bruker AI for å analysere klima- og miljøhensyn i offentlige anskaffelser Computas har utviklet en AI-basert løsning for tekstanalyse for Direktoratet for forvaltning og økonomistyring (DFØ). Løsningen gjør at DFØ raskere kan undersøke hvorvidt klima- og miljøhensyn i offentlige anskaffelser etterlever krav og kriterier i henhold til anskaffelsesforskriften. Les mer AI-oppstart ruster seg for vekst med rådgivning fra Computas Altek | About us - Computas About us - Computas Home About us About us Computas is a Nordic provider of IT solutions and consulting services in technological innovation. We deliver value-adding solutions for the public benefit to both public and private sectors. Our expertise lies especially in public administration, justice, supervision, health, logistics, power and energy. Our interdisciplinary teams offer the expertise required throughout the digitization process. We work closely with our customers to develop tailor-made solutions with high usability. Computas was established in Norway in 1985. Today, we are 350 employees – and we are 100 percent employee-owned. Our head office is located in Akersgata in central Oslo . We also have offices in Trondheim, Copenhagen , Malmö , Bucharest (Romania) , and a dedicated company for Atlassian solutions and services – Computas Opus. Our history Computas was established in 1985 as a subsidiary of Det Norske Veritas (now DNV GL). As the first company in Norway, we delivered systems based on applied artificial intelligence to Veritas and, also, to other clients in industry and public administration. This has been a sustainable foundation for the development and growth of the company and has gained renewed relevance through today’s focus on artificial intelligence , machine learning , and cloud-based solutions. Today, we have 350 employees and are 100 percent owned by our employees. Culture and values Our culture is about finding simple solutions to difficult problems. The possibilities in technology are innumerable and we know that we can use our knowledge to make a big difference in people’s lives. Technology is complicated, which is why we always go to great lengths to speak a language that people understand and create solutions that are easy to use. In January of 2011, we founded BigML with the mission of making Machine Learning easy and beautiful for everyone.
